subcodes.first_line: O noble descendant of that distinguished sire! I have inhaled the fragrance of fidelity from the garden of inner meanings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها السلیل الجلیل لذلک السید النبیل قد استنشقت رائحه الوفاء من حدیقه معانی
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @prayer for the departed, @firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @eulogies; reminiscences
